All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

B

BATTERY_STATUS_FULL - Static variable in class com.acs.smartcardio.BluetoothTerminalManager
The battery is full.
BATTERY_STATUS_LOW - Static variable in class com.acs.smartcardio.BluetoothTerminalManager
The battery is low.
BATTERY_STATUS_NONE - Static variable in class com.acs.smartcardio.BluetoothTerminalManager
No battery
BATTERY_STATUS_NOT_SUPPORTED - Static variable in class com.acs.smartcardio.BluetoothTerminalManager
The battery status is not supported.
BATTERY_STATUS_USB_PLUGGED - Static variable in class com.acs.smartcardio.BluetoothTerminalManager
The USB is plugged.
beginExclusive() - Method in class javax.smartcardio.Card
Requests exclusive access to this card.
BluetoothSmartCard - Class in com.acs.smartcardio
The BluetoothSmartCard class is a singleton that provides Bluetooth terminal manager and terminal factory.
BluetoothTerminalManager - Class in com.acs.smartcardio
The BluetoothTerminalManager class manages card terminals and uses as a parameter to initialize ACS Bluetooth provider.
BluetoothTerminalManager(Context) - Constructor for class com.acs.smartcardio.BluetoothTerminalManager
Creates an instance of BluetoothTerminalManager with context.
BluetoothTerminalManager.TerminalScanCallback - Interface in com.acs.smartcardio
Callback interface used to deliver terminal scan results.
